title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: An economics-focused podcast discussion exploring how AGI development might reshape capital and labor shares of economic output, optimal taxation and redistribution mechanisms, and strategic positioning for countries outside the AI supply chain. The episode challenges intuitive assumptions about AI's economic dominance using economic theory.
